name: Chipotle Mayonnaise
recipeIngredient: 2 chipotle chiles in adobo sauce, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the mayonnaise and sour cream in a bowl.
2. Add the chopped chipotle chiles to the mixture.
3. If using, add the dried oregano leaves.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
